conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a strong sense of mutual understanding with B, D, and H, as we all explicitly agreed to look out for one another and prioritize our families. My conversations with B and D felt particularly solid because we moved beyond just pleasantries to making a pact to have each other's backs. In contrast, I felt the least connected to J; while our talk was civil, it remained somewhat surface-level and ended quickly without a firm commitment to cooperate.

I made informal agreements to cooperate and watch each other's backs with B, D, H, and I. I feel a high level of trust toward B and D specifically because our shared motivations for being here felt very aligned. I don't necessarily distrust anyone yet, but I'm being cautious with those I haven't formed a clear pact with.
